q: The heat absorbed or released in a process occurring at constant pressure is called the enthalpy change. 2024
In a spontaneous reaction, physical or chemical change occurs with the addition of energy. 2024
The reaction between magnesium and oxygen is a non-spontaneous reaction. 2024
Enthalpy changes are due to the breaking and forming of bonds. 2024
In an exothermic reaction, the total energy absorbed for bond breaking is greater than the total energy released for bond making. 2024
The melting of ice at room temperature is a spontaneous and endothermic process. 2024
When heat is transferred to a system at constant pressure, the enthalpy of the system decreases. 2025
Energy can change from one form to another that is called energy transformation. 2025
Breaking a bond releases energy (ΔH is positive) and making a bond absorbs energy (ΔH is negative). 2025
The enthalpy change of neutralisation is the heat change that occurs when one mole of a substance is dissolved in water. 2025
When the ice melts at room temperature, that is a spontaneous and endothermic process. 2025
When the ice melts at room temperature that is a non-spontaneous and endothermic process. 2025
Combustion reactions are always endothermic and the enthalpy change are always positive. 2025
When heat is transferred from a system at constant pressure, the enthalpy of the system increases. 2026
The reaction between copper and oxygen is a spontaneous reaction. 2026
Breaking a bond releases energy (ΔH is negative) and making a bond absorbs energy (ΔH is positive). 2025
The reaction between magnesium and oxygen is non-spontaneous reaction. 2025
Iron rusting is endothermic and spontaneous. 2026
Thermal decomposition of limestone is exothermic reaction. 2026
By using Hess's law, the enthalpy change for thermochemical reactions can be determined directly. 2026
Bond enthalpy can be used to calculate the enthalpy change of a reaction and that can be measured directly. 2026
Total enthalpy change for a chemical reaction is independent on the route by which the reaction takes place. 2026
